tasting_rooms.name: Caveau de Morgon
tasting_rooms.address: 56 Rue du Chateau Fontcrenne, 69910 Villie-Morgon, France
tasting_rooms.pricing: Walk-in tasting and sales; group machon by reservation
tasting_rooms.description: The first Beaujolais cru caveau, installed since 1953 in an 18th-century chateau surrounded by a wildlife park. Pours older Morgon vintages alongside regional products; a grand press occupies the reception hall.
tasting_rooms.tip: Ask for an older vintage Morgon; the cellar stocks library bottles rarely found elsewhere.

tasting_rooms.name: Maison du Cru Fleurie
tasting_rooms.pricing: Free tasting; 4 wines poured daily; wines from 32 estates available to purchase
tasting_rooms.description: Village-centre boutique pouring wines from 32 Fleurie estates, staffed each day by a different vigneron. Four Fleurie wines offered for tasting, next to the tourist office.
tasting_rooms.tip: The vigneron on duty changes daily so each visit brings a different producer perspective.

tasting_rooms.name: Domaine de la Madone Tasting Room
tasting_rooms.address: 1230 Route de la Madone, 69820 Fleurie, France
tasting_rooms.pricing: Free walk-in tasting; guided cellar tour EUR 15/person by reservation
tasting_rooms.description: Six-generation family estate on the hillside below Fleurie's chapel. A modern tasting room opened in 2023 pours the full Fleurie range from pink granite terroir; panoramic vineyard terrace available.
tasting_rooms.tip: The Grille-Midi cuvee captures the sunnier south-facing slope; ask to compare it with the Madone old-vines.

tasting_rooms.name: Cave de Fleurie
tasting_rooms.pricing: Tastings by appointment; cooperative range from Fleurie Villages through individual lieu-dit cuvees
tasting_rooms.description: Founded in 1927, this cooperative assembles four generations of vigneron families in Fleurie. Cuvees include Les Garants, La Chapelle des Bois, and Montgenas from distinct vineyard parcels.

tasting_rooms.name: Cave du Chateau de Chenas
tasting_rooms.address: 910 Route de la Bruyere, 69840 Chenas, France
tasting_rooms.pricing: Direct sales; wines EUR 7-18 per bottle; tastings available
tasting_rooms.description: Producer cooperative in Chenas pouring the full arc of northern Beaujolais crus: Moulin-a-Vent, Chenas, Morgon, Fleurie, Julienas, Saint-Amour, Brouilly, Chiroubles, Regnié, and a Beaujolais Blanc. Bottles from EUR 7.40 with click-and-collect available.

tasting_rooms.name: Cave Cooperative de Julienas Chaintre
tasting_rooms.address: Chateau du Bois de la Salle, 69840 Julienas, France
tasting_rooms.pricing: Walk-in tastings; wines sold direct from the cooperative across 9 appellations
tasting_rooms.description: Cooperative of 85 growers managing 290 hectares across Chenas, Julienas, Moulin-a-Vent, Fleurie, and Brouilly. The Julienas tasting room is set in the Chateau du Bois de la Salle, a classified 15th-century building.
tasting_rooms.tip: The Chateau du Bois de la Salle itself is a listed monument; worth combining the tasting with a look at the architecture.

verified.address_quoted: Chateau du Bois de la Salle, 69840 Julienas

tasting_rooms.name: Vignerons des Pierres Dorees Caveau de Saint-Laurent-d'Oingt
tasting_rooms.pricing: Walk-in tastings of full Beaujolais range; regional products boutique on-site
tasting_rooms.description: Cooperative caveau in the golden-stone village of Val d'Oingt, classified among the most photogenic villages. Pours the full Vignerons des Pierres Dorees range including Terra Iconia, Prestige, and the Fines Bulles sparkling from the southern Beaujolais.
tasting_rooms.tip: The ochre village streets are among the most photogenic in the region; combine the tasting with a walk through the village ramparts.

tasting_rooms.name: La Maison des Beaujolais Caveau
tasting_rooms.pricing: Tasting by the glass; 600+ references at producer prices; guided flights with Master Sommelier available
tasting_rooms.description: The largest selection of Beaujolais wines in one place: 600+ references covering all 12 appellations at winemaker prices. Master Sommelier Guillaume Mithieux guides visitors through the full regional spectrum from Nouveau to aged Crus.
tasting_rooms.tip: Ask Guillaume to arrange a vertical of Morgon or Moulin-a-Vent across several vintages; the cellar stocks old vintages most visitors never access.

tasting_rooms.name: Chateau de Pizay Oenotheque
tasting_rooms.pricing: Sensory wine course EUR 20 per adult; 8 interactive workshops; free tasting glass included
tasting_rooms.description: The oenotheque of Beaujolais's largest estate hotel hosts a unique sensory wine course across 8 workshops covering colour, aroma, and flavour. Estate wines from Morgon, Brouilly, and Beaujolais Blanc available at the on-site boutique.

tasting_rooms.name: Chateau de la Chaize Cellar Tasting
tasting_rooms.address: 500 Route de la Chaize, 69460 Odenas, France
tasting_rooms.pricing: Guided tour and tasting EUR 30-75 per person by appointment; includes historic chai and 108m cellar
tasting_rooms.description: The 108-metre cellar of this classified 17th-century monument is the longest in the Beaujolais. Guided tours take in the gardens designed by Le Notre, the 1676 chateau, and the historic chai before a tasting of three estate wines.
tasting_rooms.tip: Weekend visits are by appointment only; book at least a week ahead during summer.

tasting_rooms.name: Chateau Thivin Tasting and Cellar
tasting_rooms.address: Chemin du Chateau de Thivin, 69460 Odenas, France
tasting_rooms.pricing: Tasting and sales at the domain; vineyard walk and cellar visit by appointment
tasting_rooms.description: The oldest estate on Mont Brouilly, in the Geoffray family for six generations. The cellar features a blue-stone vault; visitors taste Cote de Brouilly and Brouilly cuvees in a setting that dates to the 15th century.
tasting_rooms.tip: Ask to see the chapel on the hilltop above the vines; the view from the summit extends across the entire Beaujolais region.

verified.address_quoted: Chemin du Chateau de Thivin, 69460 Odenas

tasting_rooms.name: Domaine Augris Tasting Cellar
tasting_rooms.address: 604 Route de Morgon, Morgon le Haut, 69910 Villie-Morgon, France
tasting_rooms.pricing: Oenology workshop EUR 30 per person; tasting room open daily by reservation
tasting_rooms.description: Oenologist Annie Augris runs workshops on tasting methodology, vine cultivation, and Morgon cru discovery at this family domain in the upper Morgon hamlet. A relaxed, producer-direct experience with older vintages available.

verified.address_quoted: 604, route de Morgon, Morgon le Haut, 69910 Villie-Morgon

tasting_rooms.name: Domaine des Pampres d'Or Tasting and Cellar
tasting_rooms.pricing: Visit and tasting EUR 15-75 per person depending on format; blending workshop EUR 75
tasting_rooms.description: Organic family estate in the golden-stone Beaujolais Pierres Dorees zone. Offers producer-led cellar visits, barrel tastings, blending workshops, and aperitif evenings with local charcuterie and cheese.

tasting_rooms.name: Chateau de Corcelles Tasting Room
tasting_rooms.pricing: Audio-guided cellar visit with tasting; direct sales of estate wines from Beaujolais, Brouilly, and Bourgogne Blanc
tasting_rooms.description: A 15th-century fortified chateau and classified monument open year-round with an audio-guide covering the ancient cellars and remarkable 15th-century timber carpentry. Owned by the Richard family since 1984, the estate manages 90 hectares across Beaujolais and Brouilly.

tasting_rooms.name: Le Comptoir Beaujolais
tasting_rooms.address: 24 Square du Temple de Bacchus, 69430 Beaujeu, France
tasting_rooms.pricing: Walk-in tastings; wines EUR 7.50-13.00; click-and-collect and nationwide delivery available
tasting_rooms.description: The tasting cellar of 16 Beaujolais-Villages producers, founded in 1956 in the historic capital of Beaujolais. After a full renovation, the caveau pours the complete arc of appellations from Beaujolais-Villages to the 10 Crus alongside Cremant de Bourgogne.
tasting_rooms.tip: Beaujeu hosts the Sarmentelles Nouveau festival each November third Thursday; arrive a week early and the Comptoir stocks unlabelled primeur samples.

verified.address_quoted: 24 Square du Temple de Bacchus, 69430 Beaujeu
